name: Wesley Hunt
subject: Hunt For Congress Campaign update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

Summer is officially here and Team Hunt is hard at work laying the foundations for new leadership in Texas' 7th Congressional District.

We began the week, as many Americans did, by taking time to honor those who have fallen in defense of our nation. Amidst these divisive times, Memorial Day is an important reminder of the values and principles that bring us together. You can find my statement [here](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=e6cad5d75ae549f287f2dcbd4e26dd94&_e=Z4-UaO6x3BOcbTE6OY-s5eTA1yGV_afmls5iffER2t47P0TaL2lydawSH9slpeePIUvcq4EKOknAWnnMltV_iu3zBH2WUEs0sT4eb8B_mV3oYCt3VTEL1a-5GldJB-c7cFliGUNd2ozY30haFWKyEF817chsC4ej3wRwU1aniAJQb25HWvl8yLG1J6nqCkDR_Z_NVJMI7cJJVZOoF7Xw-GXLi3eA0qElBYlPVD4kJ2DhvvHcJ-tREHadv6kKAYSSvQTXTVeKpV2ZJuRPppnJ-b2c9ELogaj0Iox3TDKGi05kK1uQYcIk6kb3qXo67Kys) and my Op-Ed [here](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=e6cad5d75ae549f287f2dcbd4e26dd94&_e=Z4-UaO6x3BOcbTE6OY-s5V8zayvCMetpMJE9-4hGr4rU6vate2Z8zwdyYiSrl_LvlauqrGCAnzYMqICfsT5NYVdivZOaeszq2co4WPjLEDkeN7Bs-I43FFo879F-YpKCRjOEZduYBC4iQ7_qTOvVWvpRzaH1KTvjgCGOUIxjbChkyx3ydoBifdMsCxNzXeAOpaxyHi2XILvzBHhEt6hboHfh0lpHyao3dQod8YudICpz0nms6apH0Tk8jmpvZXBkJ46_H8SaawKdPw0LStzHOBXlQ55zFg2rIPBEqG4e5SFLR6I1UBfsMsxOUnB9PM_a).

On Thursday, [Team Hunt joined the hardworking Houstonians at Kids' Meals](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=e6cad5d75ae549f287f2dcbd4e26dd94&_e=Z4-UaO6x3BOcbTE6OY-s5eTA1yGV_afmls5iffER2t47P0TaL2lydawSH9slpeeP6t5jqROVJqS6gW9oITElOlIxpQS6uyk9KC1VcLILn3OWKoD24AwFWbTjMPkxI8ASQBKiRPOFsunFlIuZ-j2u4Uz3am3RSj5GNyCfsukJo0T4noFEKgh17bFDuxUWrsZnVdn8zw6o0YjVXQ9z9Wz3FMjoypuRUi4IMVP0y15dPk0KJn8FqfUMAmQEe4upwIhEMkNAn0zr-CgFzjMTGD6Yju7du57PMvw9izJEnUna7rh0-06gq3Z1Bp1V4tjnHsAE) to package food for families hit hardest by food insecurity. Kids' Meals is a great program that supports and protects the vulnerable children in our communities.

On Friday, I had a great conversation with KRPC's Khambrel Marshall about the message I want to bring to Houston voters this year. If you missed the broadcasting this morning, you can find the interview [here](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=e6cad5d75ae549f287f2dcbd4e26dd94&_e=Z4-UaO6x3BOcbTE6OY-s5f0L5xRH-EvEEPFXqdqiQ2OusTEC8kFeS_8pjzW64BG5k4k_anzR_5vkpyFpY0S9JOdjiVsxL84GZv3Vbfs4SZd1N3cjwmYlu04b6PADUyCUKwfU_pEikhJGz19CZ1cJk5rKVRyOx9IpZo8MFulKWeg1QLB9jowzVCAm7JewZrcVPSoxqgXmSndSfqWCHSttca_etKwfiYETYqV7LL01wQEBzwnnedrIorNLnKf5zedSuZftbqQ6Ic3XkRj1Z3i1GG9HbNRtOHTVXkhMzmsVk2NT3_U-qnL205ROLrQZne6v684cHvy3j7SwJ9GBwWvikBOS28zd_LH18HWVHu4RSN4eYhdToPYwiMCemu12RfRN08hTBAlST9GVjy-L2TXoMIf2-ZfQYt6nrENRy6vzk7U%3D).

[](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=e6cad5d75ae549f287f2dcbd4e26dd94&_e=Z4-UaO6x3BOcbTE6OY-s5aUhpWuha-wwi7oYlaLHdUQ-QDrwlh7Wq7CMREyQm1M5AGfodkOznz6_MxK7Gy3HgaKJzcYvzIzLBHF9pZa5--kPQI7zoKXf2ZUznuTL-DoTaQOuPP2auMhpNTr5Urnt4lDT_Vv9jIqXAyd9lKxcUhysUNyl4KXuxKAj_kvRJ23h_aW_FjW6M56a6sVEIu0L2g4B-gwHohPHQbYb8a-ZQS9rIcEIOUSeXibjpHHYTx_vSaHL_pi4mfDGFkKJ5WVMfywGPoKu2MkoFG_LThd_JyY%3D)

In case you missed it: This week [I responded to Lizzie Fletcher's letter admitting her support for increasing property taxes](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=e6cad5d75ae549f287f2dcbd4e26dd94&_e=Z4-UaO6x3BOcbTE6OY-s5fEdc2VsEMUXOorjeWYjzhXZ044cptUIbItAA06OKJ45NIqv9QLo35Zk3WnkYxwGsIrpKW86carcOU3l1UfJVYhm6QIwHJBSF6ycMvc1WRCij1wl6peNWBtVd8fllb_JPFHCG8lhAGsizKsLFvaY7Vb8-T3W6VD-YQ05NL-AN8pcn2j6SeshzNADS8Wh4fOF4AgKN0KY-jsrrqK0Gagrb0iLUDsMP1unrBhTNxjRvXm1N0OtRgsadNsSp-1E1oArVk58WuQc_BXA2wYiL7f--_8%3D). Tax and spend policies like these are harmful to middle-class Texans and conflict with the policies that make Texas one of the best homes in the country for businesses and families.

Your continued support remains a key component of my mission to restore conservative values to Houston. I look forward to further opportunities to serve and work with the great people of the 7th District and thank you for joining me in my campaign.

Sincerely,
Wesley

****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=e6cad5d75ae549f287f2dcbd4e26dd94&_e=Z4-UaO6x3BOcbTE6OY-s5WVX1-ipH5SvdEfVTQFrbIKQdc0G81mVFNRyvzJiaDaRCLNozY071yJQKHfQguHs6IxthXMfPTPexESHEjVqMTT7W1pjnQXdrATl7vZjx9ieCsCWMSoonnFhi7_qZHNc7Q0iTVx5hJl-KrD1RtIbHYRYvM9V75gF9XvlxfABEAn56oBpHMjENh3Y92iFuj6nPz8N3WFfQeV8T7QUghDBM8yWVTYuwYZFNpWZi0juasBMTmyOr3JYkDfmBJuQPpclWlma5-CB5qnuzquCE2_5Jms%3D)****

name: Mike Franken
subject: The countdown continues!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
We're less than 48 hours from the primary. Please permit to remind you of a few things.
|
---
| |
---

| | Hello, shipmates! We're less than 48 hours from the primary. Please permit to remind you of a few things. First, if you are voting by mail, it has to be postmarked by tomorrow -- not just in a mailbox - but postmarked Second, if you're going to vote in person, be sure to maintain social distancing, wear a mask, and wash your hands before and after you vote! _**[Lastly, if you're able, please make a donation to our campaign. We are working feverishly to get out the vote, buy last minute ads, and help people get to the polling locations.](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f256f/33365068/4a78b067/3f8bce09/222175773/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_defensefund?refcode=FRA_20200531_em_fr_48hours_all_l1")**_ And now, I extend my most ardent appreciation to all of you who have assisted in our campaign with donations, telephone calls, letters to the editor, social media shares, and encouraging words. We were outspent 25:1 by outside dark money yet we are polling at the very top as of yesterday. This will be a historical win if we can finish hard, and I am ever so proud to call you part of this team. See you in the winners' circle. Thank you. Very respectfully, Mike Franken,
Vice Admiral, USN ret.
Sioux City, Iowa
| [DONATE >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f256f/33365068/4a78b067/3f8bce0a/222175773/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_defensefund?refcode=FRA_20200531_em_fr_48hours_all_ftr")
---

---

| Paid for by Franken for Iowa
---

Dear Friend, Thank you. We had an enormous surge in the last six hours last night that brought us to just $777 shy of our target. The push was so impressive that our matching donor offered to continue matching until that $777 comes in. So, **[your next contribution will still have double the impact](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17707144/203630755/1282705599?refcode=060120_lineFF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDQ5NTYzMi0wY2E0LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ts-txImx0TtT9dcW-yzIu265fHB0HarNcbr6fCm-MDg=)**. You might be feeling quite a bit of anxiety about the state of our nation - I think we all do at some level. Here's a couple of thoughts that might restore some hope. I was at a protest in Bryan TX last night. It was entirely peaceful, with another attendee describing it as "more like a gathering than a protest - hundreds of people coming together to channel anger and frustration into a unified demand for change." I left inspired and hopeful. Finally, I'll leave you with this little one. I came across this image yesterday and it reminded me so much of myself (I didn't have the fancy helmet and jetpack though!) riveted to the TV watching Apollo missions. It made think of everything my parents' generation did to build America, and reminded me that we're in this struggle for __her future__ , not our present. Thanks for your support. # _**I NEED YOU ****WITH ME**_
We just got a new poll back and it shows a very tight race. This election is going to come down to the wire.

We are up against a pro-abortion, anti-Trump fake conservative. She has been backed by the establishment and they have given her hundreds of thousands of dollars!

We can win this thing.

We can’t miss this opportunity or take any vote for granted.

Will you help me find the final two days of voter contact? We are $2,184 short of our goal.

We are averaging $0.21 per voter contact. If we hit our goal, that means we will contact an extra 10,000 voters before Election Day — TOMORROW!

Please consider a donation of $10.50, $21, $42, $100, or $210 today to keep our phone calls and digital ads running! Donate right now at [https://www.BobbyForIowa.com/donate](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=ca50002e58&e=90fad69796 "https://www.BobbyForIowa.com/donate")

We can do this, but I need you all on board!

Let’s go!

\- Bobby Schilling

clean_body: | | | | | | | I NEED YOU WITH ME We just got a new poll back and it shows a very tight race. This election is going to come down to the wire. We are up against a pro-abortion, anti-Trump fake conservative. She has been backed by the establishment and they have given her hundreds of thousands of dollars! We can win this thing. We can’t miss this opportunity or take any vote for granted. Will you help me find the final two days of voter contact? We are $2,184 short of our goal. We are averaging $0.21 per voter contact. If we hit our goal, that means we will contact an extra 10,000 voters before Election Day — TOMORROW! Please consider a donation of $10.50, $21, $42, $100, or $210 today to keep our phone calls and digital ads running! Donate right now at "" We can do this, but I need you all on board! Let’s go! \- Bobby Schilling | "Donate Now ›" | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2020 Bobby for Iowa, All rights reserved.

subject: Upcoming Events!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Matt Mayberry for Congress
body:
| |
---
| [View in browser](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDM0MDgxNzc4OTk3NDAwNzk5JmM9ZDl4MiZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNTQwMzg0MjAmZD1iMWk2bDl6.VbF7DWGRAKyGRcOCdwbe5GF5ggTOmvaMDatTG-ELEXg)

| Mayberry For Congress Campaign Newsletter
---
---
| |
---
| |
---
| A Message from Matt!
---
The great weather is here so now is the time to start adding some visibility to our great campaign for Congress. Voters in New Hampshire expect (and deserve) to hear from their candidates and equally SEE their candidates...and this is where I need your help! We have several opportunities to help in June. The first being financial and the second, physical. Beginning on 16 June we have a series of house party fundraisers! We have over 400 New Hampshire donors (our opponent only had 25, yes, 25 NH donors). We want to keep going! [Here is a link](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDM0MDgxNzc4OTk3NDAwNzk5JmM9ZDl4MiZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNTQwMzg0MjImZD15MnUydzN4.Xn9aeDorerGlWqchdvknq8FBVrSXLV3LCQX_SsnRQdE) to get you toward some of our great house parties. We don’t need to rely on big money from New Jersey and Washington, we have plenty of friends right here in the Granite State!!

---
| |
---
|
---
| | | [ ](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDM0MDgxNzc4OTk3NDAwNzk5JmM9ZDl4MiZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNTQwMzg0MjQmZD1sMWwyZjhn.CwSSVN29HzZrt9tJtJSWZKjHlWn4eAOyLPXacREM5HY)

---
| | | [ ](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDM0MDgxNzc4OTk3NDAwNzk5JmM9ZDl4MiZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNTQwMzg0MjgmZD1rMGM2eTR0.w8UEJWfZDwMl3H9I6k9Cpp3iBJRMmPLiYAwGEWZsLKc)
---
| | | [ ](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDM0MDgxNzc4OTk3NDAwNzk5JmM9ZDl4MiZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNTQwMzg0MzAmZD1sMnE1Yzlh.wdfDzugX-v2B0t5L8aMCRxyDsK_CBd1Pmd3lKKQuKew)
---
| | | [ ](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDM0MDgxNzc4OTk3NDAwNzk5JmM9ZDl4MiZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNTQwMzg0MzImZD1hMXk3YjV0.yyERJZrjOjsPkAhPswaVORb2w49dTajlgK0rwEJt-c8)
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
| Shortly, we will be announcing July fundraisers in Manchester, North Conway, Meredith, Rye and Portsmouth (and some special guests coming in for visits to help out!).

Last week we had two very successful sign waves in Manchester and Epping. One car in Epping pulled over and asked for a sign!! Below you will find the dates, towns and times for our sign waves. We will be adding more towns and dates (especially on Saturdays!) but this gets us started. I will be at each wave because, frankly, I love them. I think they are fun and you get to see thousands of people. The primary this September 8th could be a record low turnout because of COVID-19 so every vote truly will count and the grassroots game will matter and make a difference.

I hope you can join me and other friends. Call me on my personal cell at 603.969.7077 or email [mattmayberrynh@gmail.com](mailto:mattmayberrynh@gmail.com) for specific details and locations.

Tuesday, 02 June: Hooksett 4:30pm
Thursday 04 June: Dover 4:00pm
Monday 08 June: Bedford 4:30pm
Thursday 11 June: Laconia 4;30pm
Monday 15 June: Hampton 4:30pm
Friday 19 June: Merrimack 4:30pm
Saturday 20 June: Manchester 9:00am
Saturday 20 June: Londonderry 11:00am
Monday 22 June: Derry 3:30pm
Thursday 25 June: Wolfeboro 3:00pm

I hope to see you during the month of June. Thank you for your help and continued support. No one will work harder for your vote than me. _I am the only veteran in this race._ I am the _only PROVEN defender of our Second Amendment Rights._ I am the _only candidate for Congress_ who has spent 30 years getting New Hampshire Republicans successfully elected at every level. I'm the only candidate in this race who has pledged to help New Hampshire Republican State Reps and State Senators win _their_ local elections. I want NH to be a GOP controlled State. I won’t let you down. Thank you! \- Matt

name: Teresa Tomlinson
subject: AJC Morning Headline: “Amico, Ossoff stroke big checks in final stretch of Senate primary”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE
body:
| |
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17713046/203752704/1270449060?refcode=em060120-header&refcode2=b9e6dc5c-3ca4-ea11-9b05-00155d03b5dd&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWU2ZGM1Yy0zY2E0LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Upx30Yg61npO_iQKjyCrpI3kJkYFcJBwGIdBz-KDxmA=) **** | | Friend, the headline in this morning’s _Atlanta Journal-Constitution_ reads: **“Amico, Ossoff stroke big checks in final stretch of Senate primary.”**

Every Democrat in this race shares a commitment to defeating David Perdue in November, but it will take a candidate with a grassroots movement to do it.

I haven’t written myself a $450,000 check to buy TV ads. I haven’t self-financed $1.1 million to win this seat. I don’t take corporate PAC money. **But our campaign has raised over $2.5 million, including the most money of any campaign from Georgians by a significant margin.**

Georgians know we need a leader with experience, who has won elections, and governed well to beat an entrenched incumbent with the backing of the most powerful people in the Republican Party. That’s why so many thousands of you have invested in our campaign.

[**The people of Georgia must decide this race, friend. I’m counting on you to give our campaign the resources to counter the six-figure checks my opponents have written to pay for expensive TV ads in this final week. Will you donate to our campaign today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17713047/203752705/1270449060?refcode=em060120&refcode2=b9e6dc5c-3ca4-ea11-9b05-00155d03b5dd&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWU2ZGM1Yy0zY2E0LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Upx30Yg61npO_iQKjyCrpI3kJkYFcJBwGIdBz-KDxmA=) | | If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:

clean_body: | | | | = ** | | Friend, the headline in this morning’s Atlanta Journal-Constitution reads: “Amico, Ossoff stroke big checks in final stretch of Senate primary.” Every Democrat in this race shares a commitment to defeating David Perdue in November, but it will take a candidate with a grassroots movement to do it. I haven’t written myself a $450,000 check to buy TV ads. I haven’t self-financed $1.1 million to win this seat. I don’t take corporate PAC money. But our campaign has raised over $2.5 million, including the most money of any campaign from Georgians by a significant margin. Georgians know we need a leader with experience, who has won elections, and governed well to beat an entrenched incumbent with the backing of the most powerful people in the Republican Party. That’s why so many thousands of you have invested in our campaign. = | | If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: = = = = Your support is critical to our victory! Yours truly, Teresa PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE PMB 263, 3201 Macon Rd Ste 139, Columbus, GA 31906 =

name: Dean Browning
subject: Tomorrow is Election Day!
body:
Here are some of my final words before Election Day!
---
| | | | | |
---
| Dear Patriot,
I am here to URGENTLY to remind you that TOMORROW IS ELECTION DAY.
I am putting my trust in YOU and know you will make the right choice tomorrow for our future.
Your support and your vote will help me win this election and give the people of the Lehigh Valley a true voice for conservative values. My campaign has activated hundreds of volunteers across Lehigh Valley to get out the vote and remind people to VOTE FOR DEAN BROWNING!
But it will all be for naught if you do not get to the polls!
It is our civic duty as Americans to exercise our most fundamental freedom: The Right to Vote. Wars have been fought, movements created, and generations changed over this right. We must not let down those who have fought for this right before us.
If you need any assistance with getting to the polls, please contact my campaign at 484-550-6550, and we will arrange transportation to ensure your vote counts in this Primary Election.
I look forward to earning your support and your vote tomorrow!
See you at the polls!!
For Freedom,
---
|
---
| Dean Browning Conservative Republican for Congress, PA-07
P.S. ~ I am here to URGENTLY remind you that TOMORROW IS ELECTION DAY.
Please consider making a last-minute donation to our campaign to push us across the finish line!
---

subject: Our fight for frontline workers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sánchez
body:
**I 'm doing everything in my power to help the heroes working on the frontlines of the COVID-19 health crisis.**
Last month, I worked to:
* Co-write legislation that would provide hazard pay to essential workers.

* Introduce the _Providing Essentials for Frontline Workers Act_ , which will help cover expenses for essential workers.

* Help pass the Heroes Act through the House.

Now, more than ever, this country needs experienced leaders to help navigate us through this crisis. But to keep prioritizing frontline heroes and working folks across the country, I really need your help. **[Can I count on you to make a contribution to my re-election campaign?](https://act.myngp.com/el/LOCo9CJHjtEE0M9AL4oWzMRyEHX-5AVeDKug4GdhMvI=/l_GNsknXigyKRw9rsxRQ2BAtcLlo52pbhZBpIXm8Hkk=?refcode=X_060120_DelayedEOM)**

subject: Women deserve better than this
body:
I need your help to fight back against this vulgar attack. | |
---
| | |
---
| Friends,

There’s no bar of decency that my opponent and his supporters won’t slither under. This graphic that they’ve put out reflects their depravity; it shows who they are; it tells you what you need to know about their preferred candidate, and [I need your support to fight back.](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60170c3a179cc01468053f87a&id=f026e9115c&e=c1dbff800f)

---
|
---
|
**Women deserve better than this. Those who’ve struggled with mental health issues and had the courage to speak out deserve better than this. And, yes, I deserve better than this. I need YOUR support.**

---
| [DONATE](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60170c3a179cc01468053f87a&id=4daae5c8eb&e=c1dbff800f "DONATE")

-Renee

"Frustrated by a faltering economy that is out of his control, and facing blowback for his suggestion that disinfectants could potentially combat the coronavirus, **President Trump had sunk to one of his lowest points in recent months last week.** And he directed his anger toward the one area that is most important to him: his re-election prospects.

Mr. Trump, according to multiple people familiar with the exchange, **erupted during a phone call with his campaign manager, Brad Parscale,** two days after he was presented with polling data from his campaign and the Republican National Committee that showed him trailing Joseph R. Biden Jr., the presumptive Democratic nominee, in several crucial states.

**He lashed out at Mr. Parscale and said it was other people’s fault that there had been fluctuations in a race** they had all seen as his to lose just two months ago. At one point, Mr. Trump said he would not lose to Mr. Biden, **insisted the data was wrong and blamed the campaign manager for the fact that he is down in the polls,** according to one of the people familiar with the conversation. **Mr. Trump even made a threat to sue Mr. Parscale,** mentioning the money he has made while working for the president..."

clean_body: Read a juicy excerpt here: | Peter -- Trump is in a full blown panic. Recent polling shows that Trump's re-election is SINKING because of his failures during the COVID-19 crisis -- he's LOSING to Joe Biden in many of these polls! So (as Trump always does), he's blaming everyone around him instead of realizing it's his own fault! Trump is acting so pathetic! But Peter, we remember when polls and experts said that Trump was FAR behind our candidate in 2016... [We need a wide set of data to confirm and verify this news that Trump is floundering. So we're asking you to complete this easy [1]-Click Poll before 11:45 PM tonight. All responses are anonymous and confidential! >>]() | | ---|--- [ [1]-Click Poll distributed on June 1, 2020. This poll requires 4,000 more responses for data to be statistically sound. ]() After you complete this poll, if you have a moment to spare, you should read a juicy excerpt from the NYTimes here: ↘↘ "Frustrated by a faltering economy that is out of his control, and facing blowback for his suggestion that disinfectants could potentially combat the coronavirus, President Trump had sunk to one of his lowest points in recent months last week. And he directed his anger toward the one area that is most important to him: his re-election prospects. Mr. Trump, according to multiple people familiar with the exchange, erupted during a phone call with his campaign manager, Brad Parscale, two days after he was presented with polling data from his campaign and the Republican National Committee that showed him trailing Joseph R. Biden Jr., the presumptive Democratic nominee, in several crucial states. He lashed out at Mr. Parscale and said it was other people’s fault that there had been fluctuations in a race they had all seen as his to lose just two months ago. At one point, Mr. Trump said he would not lose to Mr. Biden, insisted the data was wrong and blamed the campaign manager for the fact that he is down in the polls, according to one of the people familiar with the conversation. Mr. Trump even made a threat to sue Mr. Parscale, mentioning the money he has made while working for the president..." [Peter, please take our [1]-Click Poll to tell us if you approve of Donald Trump. We really need to verify that the momentum is shifting for Democrats! >>]() | ---|--- [ [1]-Click Poll distributed on June 1, 2020. name: =?utf-8?Q?Bret=20Richards?=
subject: 🎉 You're invited!
body:
Join Bret and the rest of the campaign volunteers in person or online for our Election Night Victory Party!

Hello

I'm so honored and appreciative of the hard work you've done for our campaign. Tomorrow is when it all pays off.

I wanted to make sure you know you're invited to our Election Night Victory Party here in Irwin to thank you and every one of our volunteers for everything you've done so far. We'll get things going at 7 PM and close around 11 PM. You can also follow along
on Facebook Live (https://www.facebook.com/BretRichards4Congress/posts/2642579539393589?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=a31978afa6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-a31978afa6-25822489) starting at 9 PM when polls close.

In Irwin, we'll be gathering at campaign headquarters (506 Ann St, Irwin, IA 51446). Light refreshments and drinks will be provided. You can arrive when you'd like and leave when you want. We should start getting results in after 9 PM, but no one can say when all precincts will finish reporting.

We'll also be keeping to the Governor's and CDC's social distancing guidelines. Masks are encouraged.

Our grassroots campaign owes it all to your efforts. Let's celebrate tomorrow and then it's back to the campaign trail on Wednesday!

Thank you again,

Bret Richards
(712) 579-4753

Please Contribute today! (https://richardsforcongress.com/contribution/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=a31978afa6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-a31978afa6-25822489)

Campaign email: bret@richardsforcongress.com
Please visit our webpage: www.RichardsForCongress.com (http://www.richardsforcongress.com?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=a31978afa6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-a31978afa6-25822489)
Please like and share our Facebook page (https://www.facebook.com/BretRichards4Congress/?ref=bookmarks&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=a31978afa6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-a31978afa6-25822489)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kathy=20Tall?=
subject: Your weekly #TeamDani update!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dani for Illinois
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/77937618ac41/your-weekly-teamdani-update?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
Hello, wonderful Dani for Illinois volunteers! I hope all of you and your loved ones are safe and healthy. **Check out the incredible work you put in last week and in May!**
* You were able to reach out to over**4,954 voters** in the 16th district on the phone this week!
* During the month of May, you called more people than fit in the Cornhuskers arena - **16,362 voters!**
* This month, we sent out **1,726 postcards** to volunteer writers! No one can say you aren’t doing your part to #SaveUSPS
* We had our monthly Supporting Organizations call last week! Checking in with all the groups around the district together about the wonderful work being done by them. If you’re in an organization that would like to work with us to get Adam out of office, let me know! We’d love to add you to our call for June!

**A few reminders:**
* If you are interested in hosting a **Virtual House Party** for Dani, reach out to Marguerite at [marguerite@daniforillinois.com](mailto:marguerite@daniforillinois.com). We will walk you through it, we just need you to invite your friends and pour yourself your happy hour drink of choice!
* While you’re still on the phone finishing phone banking, **CALL YOUR FRIENDS!** Everyone in your social circles has the potential to be an activist and volunteer right alongside you - you never know unless you ask!

**Volunteer Voice! ** The guest columnist this week is... Dave K! _I think about how I can frame my 30 second opening in the kindest manner I can think of/ even knowing that I may be rejected or hung up on the call._ _For instance, I always open by saying, "May I speak to ____. _
1. _I do this to catch the person off guard. Rather than acting like I am their friend with the opening line we have scripted, I ask for their permission and ask with the correct pronunciation of the complete name._
2. _I frequently am asked "Who is calling" and I can go into script since I have their attention and am a polite caller._
3. _I find that when I kill them with kindness, I have a better chance of the caller listening to my complete thought. I also find that the caller is most likely to be polite back to me with a response; even if it is not the one I want._
Kathy Tall
Deputy Field Director

name: =?iso-8859-1?q?Juli=E1n?= Castro
subject: Police Violence is gun violence
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People First Future
body:
Nearly one thousand Americans are shot and killed by police each year — a disproportionate amount of them being Black women and men.
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17714226/203788993/-1445340428?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTYvMS83MjQyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTEzMWM5YS00YmE0LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5h0peUYXHvEaGPDso3HKqSEvSglGtDuYj1Urb10l8NQ=&emci=6139a64a-44a4-ea11-9b05-00155d03b5dd&emdi=ee131c9a-4ba4-ea11-9b05-00155d03b5dd&ceid=1262380)
Team, today is the first day of Gun Violence Awareness Month.
Normally, this is a time when we mourn gun violence in our communities, lift up the voices of those who have been impacted by it, and call on our lawmakers to enact common sense gun violence prevention legislation.
But, as our nation continues to mourn the loss of George Floyd, we must also recognize that **so much police violence IS gun violence** — and we need lawmakers who have the courage to act on both.
**[That's why I launched People First Future. To elect bold, progressive leaders from city hall to the halls of Congress who aren't afraid to fight for change. Will you join me in supporting them?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17714227/203788994/488827293?refcode=em20200601-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTYvMS83MjQyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTEzMWM5YS00YmE0LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5h0peUYXHvEaGPDso3HKqSEvSglGtDuYj1Urb10l8NQ=)**
[Contribute →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17714228/203788997/488827293?refcode=em20200601-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTYvMS83MjQyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTEzMWM5YS00YmE0LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5h0peUYXHvEaGPDso3HKqSEvSglGtDuYj1Urb10l8NQ=)
As I said during my campaign, people of color are far too often the subject of police violence and brutality. **Nearly one thousand Americans are shot and killed by police each year** — a disproportionate amount of them being Black women and men.
We know there are steps we can take _right now_ to save lives, which is why I put forward my own plans on gun violence and police reform. **But it isn't enough for us to offer solutions** — we also need to elect candidates who have the courage to act on those solutions.
Candidates like Lucy McBath in Georgia, who lost her son to gun violence but channeled her grief into action. **These are the leaders we need fighting for us.**
**[So I hope you'll join me in pitching in $25 (or whatever you can) to elect these leaders. They're counting on your support so they can make meaningful change on issues like gun violence and police violence.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17714229/203789063/488827293?refcode=em20200601-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTYvMS83MjQyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTEzMWM5YS00YmE0LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5h0peUYXHvEaGPDso3HKqSEvSglGtDuYj1Urb10l8NQ=)**
Together, we can elect leaders with a people-first agenda who will tackle the tough issues. Now, more than ever, we need lawmakers with the courage and ideas to get things done. I'm counting on you to help them win.
Thank you,
Julián
****[Contribute →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17714230/203789078/488827293?refcode=em20200601-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTYvMS83MjQyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTEzMWM5YS00YmE0LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5h0peUYXHvEaGPDso3HKqSEvSglGtDuYj1Urb10l8NQ=)****

name: Sri Preston Kulkarni
subject: reflecting on this difficult week
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17714265/203790547/-717699460?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOWVmNGYzNi00Y2E0LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4_xVIWW6NEeQJrUm1rrsEo4PQyroE7fQdgdztNkMu7E=&emci=bfea4c83-46a4-ea11-9b05-00155d03b5dd&emdi=c9ef4f36-4ca4-ea11-9b05-00155d03b5dd&ceid=14145524)
---
| _Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas.

Please visit our [COVID-19 community resource guide](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17714266/203790548/-466961882?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOWVmNGYzNi00Y2E0LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4_xVIWW6NEeQJrUm1rrsEo4PQyroE7fQdgdztNkMu7E=&emci=bfea4c83-46a4-ea11-9b05-00155d03b5dd&emdi=c9ef4f36-4ca4-ea11-9b05-00155d03b5dd&ceid=14145524) to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe._

* * *
Team,

I first want to acknowledge the support of the coalition we’ve built thus far in TX-22. Thanks to your support, we managed to meet and exceed our May fundraising goal, _and for that I’m personally grateful._

**But I would be remiss if I didn’t take the time to reflect on this difficult and urgent moment in our country.**

Like many of you, I’m angry, tired, disheartened, and confused. America watched George Floyd, a Yates alumnus and Houston native, murdered on camera by a police officer, while other officers watched and bystanders begged for his life.

We grieve and protest, but we should not be shocked, because when we mourn George Floyd we also grieve and protest for Ahmaud Arbery, Breonna Taylor, Eric Garner and so many others whose names we don’t know because their deaths were not caught on tape and their families will never get justice.

We also protest for the countless others who were not killed, but have been brutalized and dehumanized by a broken system. We are disheartened because those who address the riots and not the racism confuse cause for effect. This is not about one bad apple or one incident but a disease that infects our entire society born of a system founded in unequal justice which persists to this day.

We know that we need more investment in our local communities. We know that we need law enforcement officers who know their communities and communities must know that the officers who police them are there to protect them, regardless of what they look like. We need body cameras on every officer, training on de-escalation, and a legal system that doesn’t disproportionately punish people based on race.

Most of all, our black and brown communities deserve to know that real meaningful change will occur. We need to know that people in positions of power will act to stop brutality and dehumanization, not look the other way or encourage it.

We have been here before, in Ferguson, in LA, in Chicago, in Detroit and in Watts. We cannot allow Minneapolis just to be the next city added to this list. Now more than ever, we need real leadership that represents all of us, not just some. We have a responsibility to act as allies, use our voices, rights, and power that we have to band together and demand real change.

It’s past time we treat the disease and not just the symptoms.

[**If you’re able to, I hope you’ll join us as allies at tomorrow’s Justice 4 George Floyd community event that has been organized with his family to honor the life of our fellow Houstonian and support Houston’s Black community.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17714267/203790549/-717699460?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOWVmNGYzNi00Y2E0LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4_xVIWW6NEeQJrUm1rrsEo4PQyroE7fQdgdztNkMu7E=&emci=bfea4c83-46a4-ea11-9b05-00155d03b5dd&emdi=c9ef4f36-4ca4-ea11-9b05-00155d03b5dd&ceid=14145524)

Thank you for all you do,
Sri
---
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17714268/203790550/307941387?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOWVmNGYzNi00Y2E0LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4_xVIWW6NEeQJrUm1rrsEo4PQyroE7fQdgdztNkMu7E=&emci=bfea4c83-46a4-ea11-9b05-00155d03b5dd&emdi=c9ef4f36-4ca4-ea11-9b05-00155d03b5dd&ceid=14145524)

**Sri Preston Kulkarni** is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he’ll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington.
* * *
Bringing true representation to TX-22. Learn more at [sri2020.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17714269/203790551/307941387?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOWVmNGYzNi00Y2E0LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4_xVIWW6NEeQJrUm1rrsEo4PQyroE7fQdgdztNkMu7E=&emci=bfea4c83-46a4-ea11-9b05-00155d03b5dd&emdi=c9ef4f36-4ca4-ea11-9b05-00155d03b5dd&ceid=14145524)
---
| Paid for by Sri for Congress
---
SRI FOR CONGRESS
P.O. BOX 898
SUGAR LAND, TX 77487-0898

If you wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/bfea4c83-46a4-ea11-9b05-00155d03b5dd/c9ef4f36-4ca4-ea11-9b05-00155d03b5dd?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOWVmNGYzNi00Y2E0LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4_xVIWW6NEeQJrUm1rrsEo4PQyroE7fQdgdztNkMu7E=&id=117373579).

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: President Trump: George Floyd’s Death Filled America 'With Horror, Anger and Grief'
body:
"President Trump on Saturday vowed to stop ‘mob violence,’ as he condemned riots that have broken out amid what originally were protests..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=384efd09c7&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **President Trump: George Floyd’s Death Filled America 'With Horror, Anger and Grief'**

“President Trump on Saturday vowed to stop ‘mob violence,’ as he condemned riots that have broken out amid what originally were protests across the country in response to Minneapolis man George Floyd’s death in police custody earlier this week,” Fox News reports.

“The president called Floyd’s death a ‘tragedy’ and said ‘it should never have happened.’”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=901bdffb93&e=3ee4985eea)

name: Josh Hicks
subject: Breonna Taylor
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress
body:
Friends —

All over the country, including right here in Kentucky, we’re seeing protests in response to the police violence that has left Breonna Taylor, George Floyd, and many others dead, and their families grieving.

Two months ago, Breonna Taylor was killed in the middle of the night during a no-knock drug raid. She was an EMT in Louisville, and she was just 26 years old.

There is nothing anyone can ever do to make her family — or the families of any of those who have lost a loved one to police violence — whole again. But that doesn’t mean we can’t respond to injustice by seeking change that brings justice.

I know, as a former police officer myself, that police officers have a tremendous responsibility to the communities they police. Our responsibility is to keep the public trust, to ensure that we, as officers, are seen as community members striving to keep communities safe.

And when the public trust is broken, we have to work very hard to earn it back. From the top down, it takes an entire police force committed to change and willing to enact policy, welcome oversight, and commit themselves to public service and justice.

Breonna Taylor's death made it clear that, as a first step, we need to change the process and policy guiding no-knock search warrants, those that authorize police to kick down a door without announcing their presence. While there may be situations, related to armed and active offenders, that meet the criteria, the grant of a no-knock warrant must require more scrutiny, a higher standard, and more oversight.

What we saw in Minneapolis in the attempted arrest of George Floyd was not police work. There is no police training that authorizes you to kneel on someone’s neck for nine minutes. I say this as not only a former officer, but as a former Field Training Officer who trained police officers that are still working today. There is absolutely no defense for what happened to George Floyd. We can’t be afraid to speak that truth, or we don’t deserve the public’s trust.

We need to act immediately — we need to fully investigate where warranted, get to the independent truth above all, charge criminal penalties where appropriate, and make real, substantive changes in our policing tactics and police department culture to earn that trust back from the community.

The only way we move forward — whether as citizens or police officers — is to confront and address the structural problems, including bias and racism, that we know exist, and are a daily reality for people of color. Only then can we take the kind of action that will prevent these tragedies from happening again and let us move forward as a people, united.

Josh

Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress
Josh Hicks for Congress
PO Box 1214
Lexington, KY 40588
United States
Josh Hicks is a Democrat running to represent Kentucky’s 6th Congressional District. He will be a representative who puts the needs of his constituents front and center in Washington. Josh grew up in Fleming County before leaving to serve in the Marines. After two deployments, he returned to Kentucky to serve his community as a police officer and attorney.
He’s running to represent hardworking, everyday Kentuckians. Not corporations. That means his campaign is relying on grassroots donations — lots of small donations from emails like this — not big checks from corporate special interests. Please consider making a $5 contribution to Josh’s campaign today.
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/9c5362af-47a4-ea11-9b05-00155d03b5dd/b9bb7e28-4da4-ea11-9b05-00155d03b5dd?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWJiN2UyOC00ZGE0LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HXnn2c2LjZz7MYIHhc-ozTns0UtDUbsQoLQly0DlvTY=&id=120613561

subject: Insurance Insiders Trying to Buy Auditor's Office
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TROY DOWNING FOR MONTANA
body:
|
---
| |
---
| |
# $120K of Dark Money from Insurance Company
Insurance companies are trying to buy the auditor’s office. Why? For personal gain and control. Victory Insurance, a private workman’s compensation carrier, managed and owned by one of the Auditor candidate's family (whom she also works for), has had a nearly decade-long war with the State Auditor’s office over the Auditor’s office’s oversight of the company.

So how do they solve their transparency problems with the Auditor? -They get the daughter of the company’s owner, Nelly Nicol to run for Auditor. Or, look at Scott Tuxbury, his campaign donations are almost exclusively from the industry he wants to regulate.

My opponent filed complaints about my ad “Fox in the Hen House”, that brings light to their dishonest, insider intentions. But in nearly the same breath used dark money to quietly move another $120,000 in ads to support an insider opponent.

All told, the insurance company has spent nearly $200,0000 to put them in charge of the “Henhouse”.
---
|
---
| Nelly repeats "I love insurance", Tuxbury states, "I wake up thinking about insurance, and I think about insurance when I go to bed", Troy loves Montanans and will fight for them, protecting consumers from bad actors.

If you want someone who looks after consumers and is a watchdog for all Montanans—Vote Troy Downing for Auditor.
Drop your ballot off by 8 pm tomorrow (6/2)

clean_body: You did it. == Friend, I wanted to reach out personally and say THANK YOU. We hit our May goal, and it's all because of supporters like you. We have a difficult road ahead of us, but as long as you continue to fight, we can WIN in November. Supporters like you are the life of our campaign. Every donation, no matter how small, helps fight back against vicious smears and attacks and allows us to spread our conservative message. Your support is essential. My far-left opponent entered 2020 as the top Senate fundraiser in the country, and he does things differently. Liberal megadonors and Hollywood progressives are powering his campaign. Chuck Schumer has promised him millions, and millions more will pour into Arizona before Election Day. Even though we hit our goal this month, we are still severely behind in fundraising. My opponent and I are neck-and-neck, and there's no room for error. That's why we can't slow down either. == == == == Again, thank you so much for your support. name: Cory Gardner iPhone
subject: Catching up from over the weekend
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CORY GARDNER FOR SENATE
body:
Our radical leftwing opponent, failed presidential candidate John Hickenlooper, released his first ad, and not unlike his run for president, it was full of hot air and misleading claims. Even more alarming, Hickenlooper has pledged more than $100,000 to run the ad on TV and continue spreading his narrative of failed leftwing policies and the far-Left's tax-and-spend agenda.
_Our 2014 victory here in Colorado was a watershed moment on behalf of Republicans nationwide. Our win proved that similar to the rest of the country, Coloradans were fed up with the Democrats ' empty promises. And in the last six years, I've tirelessly fought to uplift my fellow Americans through pro-growth policies and common-sense legislating.

And this year, I'm facing another critical Battleground Election. National Democrats are investing millions in Colorado to flip the Senate from red to blue._
---
Friend,

A few big moments occurred over the weekend, and I wanted to touch base with you to make sure you were up to speed on what's happened in the last 24 hours.

subject: ANTIFA has terrorized our communities for far too long
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JANET BARRESI FOR CONGRESS
body:
It's past time we come together to condemn violence and hatred. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/9849cf580b18/calling-all-patriots-12457338?e=795c6d9796)
---
| | [ ](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=9da9a6395f&e=795c6d9796)
---
| [ ](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=a536e019a1&e=795c6d9796)
---
| | [STAND AGAINST ANTIFA. SIGN THE PETITION >>](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=f780587363&e=795c6d9796 "STAND AGAINST ANTIFA. SIGN THE PETITION >>")
---
| Peter, **President Trump has announced that ANTIFA will formally be designated as a terrorist organization.** Terrorism is defined as “the use of violence and intimidation in pursuit of political aims.” It’s how we defined ISIS, al-Qaeda, the Taliban and every other organization that seeks to bring harm to our nation. ANTIFA has terrorized our communities for years, inciting riots and violent protests all in the name of their radical political agenda. **Hatred and violence have no place in America.** [**Show your support for President Trump’s decision to recognize ANTIFA as a terrorist organization. SIGN THE PETITION TODAY and then share it on your Facebook and Twitter pages.**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=ee3401c4fc&e=795c6d9796)
---
| [SIGN THE PETITION](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=2589124610&e=795c6d9796 "SIGN THE PETITION")
---
| Our country must unite in condemning violence and recognize that the bonds of love and loyalty that bring us together are stronger than the wicked forces trying to divide us. **ANTIFA has no place in the United States of America.** Let’s show President Trump that we stand with his decision. [**SIGN THE PETITION to tell President Trump that we stand AGAINST violence and hatred.**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=cdd2888119&e=795c6d9796)
Thank you and God bless America,

Team Janet
---
| [SIGN THE PETITION to stand against ANTIFA>>](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=4e5a5a2924&e=795c6d9796 "SIGN THE PETITION to stand against ANTIFA>>")

name: Claire (personal)
subject: Don't forget to vote tomorrow, Peter!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CLAIRE CHASE FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
Let's turn New Mexico red!
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hi Peter \- I wanted to touch base one more time before the election to lay out my priorities and remind you to make sure you get out and vote tomorrow!
[One important reminder: If you requested an absentee ballot, but have not returned it yet, make sure you physically bring it to your polling place or county clerk's office before 7pm tomorrow. If your ballot is not physically at the polling place or county clerk's office by 7pm tomorrow, it will not get counted. If you don't know your polling place location you can look it up by clicking HERE.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001U60tG565KO-kuVr3Rc3kWvJPuBMSpIyOtBt721Se7ezMkH5_r0tAX_zpo6eXObyN2S0Zdo7gn-SQ_55HjnO4Tg1YGT6fr0JW_XwEwl-7WX05_BAmSDDRWr1rg-qthli2k00-aJ4TX_jRpXxZLa4UD7TgYYR0pstzDm3an6Wg8o8obOD6oc7cXIexKozq-elZpeC1EVa8WUo=&c=7jvwa3xAe1H2O3MkS-aAoU8wC609BTeQoVUmQzeMdoR9y5Me_E-1wg==&ch=efQ6IcidNv3tqbmibfNn_JuzFdBdhOYOBtmM9_br5et6ywmSyCr_WA==)
Why I'm Running:
The most important thing a candidate can tell you is why they are running for office. Once you know that -- you know exactly what they'll be fighting for when they are elected.
For me, it's simple: our children.
I want your children, and my twins, Cash and Collins, to be able to call New Mexico home. I want them to be able to raise a family here, grow a business here, and always feel safe here.
But Nancy Pelosi, AOC, and our liberal Congresswoman have been pushing a radical agenda of open borders, gun-grabs, and higher taxes that would make that future impossible to attain.
So, nine months ago I decided to get off the sidelines and run for Congress because our district deserves a representative who will help President Trump build the wall, defend our pro-life, pro-gun values, and work to make our economy stronger.
And since that day, tens of thousands of incredible men and women have rallied behind us to make sure we send a pro-Trump conservative who shares our values to Congress in November.
I'm incredibly grateful for each and every supporter we've met along the way and I'd be honored to have your vote. If you choose me as your representative in Congress, you have my word that I'll serve you honorably and do my best never to let you down.
---
| God bless,
---

subject: PETITION: End the Anarchy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate 2226 Cottondale Lane
body:
I respect the rights of peaceful protestors. But there must be ZERO TOLERANCE for the violence and destruction of property we see across America each night. This chaos is fomented by “Antifa” and the radical left, and it has nothing to do with the death of George Floyd. If local politicians will not protect our cities, let's see how these rioters respond when they're dealing with the 101st Airborne Division.Click here to unsubscribe http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/OneClickOptOutServlet?m=42631822&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc4MDA3NDg3MwS2&mt=1&rt=0

If local politicians will not protect our cities, let's see how these rioters respond when they're dealing with the 101st Airborne Division.

Sign my Petition if you agree: It is time to crack down on these violent protestors. http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI2MzE4MjIS1&kn=9&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTc4MDA3NDg3MwS2&mt=1&rt=0

I applaud President Trump’s call to treat Antifa like a terror organization.

In Washington, the riots and anarchy have brought fire, vandalism, and destruction to historical churches, veterans memorials, and sacred national shrines like the Lincoln Memorial.

Sign my Petition if you agree: It is time to crack down on these violent protestors. http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI2MzE4MjIS1&kn=1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTc4MDA3NDg3MwS2&mt=1&rt=0

If necessary, the president should use the Insurrection Act to deploy active-duty military forces to these cities to support our local law enforcement and ensure this violence ends tonight.

Not one more night.

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: George Floyd, Ahmaud Arbery, Breonna Taylor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
His family, friends, and the people of Minneapolis deserve justice. Breonna Taylor, Ahmaud Arbery should be alive -- and so many more. We have to make real change in our country. And it must start in | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525746/45c30650/1c85ab0c4/66e9cdd9/2913271866/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
| I wanted to make sure you saw the comments I made on Friday. **[But first, there are groups across the country working hard to promote racial justice and rid our country of white supremacy, and if you're able to, I'm asking you to donate to them.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525746/45c30650/1c85ab0c4/66e9cdd8/2913271866/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1SMTlPX05PQV9FV0RfRV8yMDIwMDUyOV9WMVMxX1AifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-blm-060120?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMR19O_NOA_EWD_E_20200529_V1S1_P")**

---

George Floyd should still be alive today. His family, friends, and the people of Minneapolis deserve justice. Breonna Taylor, Ahmaud Arbery should be alive -- and so many more.

The racist violence that killed George Floyd, Ahmaud Arbery, and Breonna Taylor is not new in America. We've seen sickening videos of Black Americans shot at point-blank range; killed during routine traffic stops; choked to death while gasping for air. And we know what's captured on video represents only a fraction of the violence that Black Americans experience, some of it while in police custody.

On Friday, Donald Trump referred to Black citizens in Minnesota protesting the killing of George Floyd at the hands of police as thugs and called for them to be shot, echoing the words of notorious racists of the past.

Trump is quoting old racists for a simple and ugly reason. This president is a racist, too, and any leader who refuses to swiftly and unequivocally condemn this outrageous statement shares responsibility for its consequences.

Trump threatens American lives and American democracy. We need to vote him and his enablers out. But people are hurting for reasons that go beyond Trump's statements. It's systemic racism and white supremacy that forces us to call for justice for George Floyd after he has been killed instead of providing it to him before the unthinkable happens.

As a nation and a society we have some soul searching to do. Racial disparities persist in wealth, education, employment, housing, education, and health care -- and at a time when COVID-19 is disproportionately killing Black Americans and Black businesses are going under, it can feel as if this is the way things have been and always will be.

But we are not without hope. The deep injustices we face are not inevitable. They were created and facilitated through racist, hateful, bigoted public policies. That means they can be addressed by different policies -- brave, inclusive, moral public policies.

We have to make real change in our country. And it must start in our criminal justice system. In the case of George Floyd, all of those responsible must be held accountable -- and the Department of Justice must open a real investigation into unconstitutional policing patterns and practices in the Minneapolis Police Department.

But beyond this case, we must fundamentally reform how the law is enforced in America. We need accountability for law enforcement and accountability at every stage of our criminal justice system. And any decent person who brings integrity and compassion to their work in the criminal justice system should welcome that kind of accountability. In fact, they should demand it.

And we need to do much more to rethink our approach to public safety. That means transitioning away from a punitive system of locking people up and investing in community services that lift people up.

The idea that communities of color alone are responsible for fighting against racism every single day is misguided and can have dangerous consequences. I also want to be thoughtful about the responsibility that I and others have as white Americans in this moment. We need to ask ourselves what we are doing proactively every day to dismantle systemic racism in our communities, our workplaces, and our circles of influence. It's not enough to stand as an ally. We must go further and be anti-racist.

**[If you're in a place to donate, please consider donating to these organizations working to promote racial justice. This is a small first step, but every action we take adds up, and our response to this moment will shape our future.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525746/45c30650/1c85ab0c4/66e9cdd8/2913271866/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1SMTlPX05PQV9FV0RfRV8yMDIwMDUyOV9WMVMxX1AifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-blm-060120?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMR19O_NOA_EWD_E_20200529_V1S1_P")**

Elizabeth

clean_body: His family, friends, and the people of Minneapolis deserve justice. Breonna Taylor, Ahmaud Arbery should be alive -- and so many more. We have to make real change in our country. And it must start in | | | "" | I wanted to make sure you saw the comments I made on Friday. "" George Floyd should still be alive today. His family, friends, and the people of Minneapolis deserve justice. Breonna Taylor, Ahmaud Arbery should be alive -- and so many more. The racist violence that killed George Floyd, Ahmaud Arbery, and Breonna Taylor is not new in America. We've seen sickening videos of Black Americans shot at point-blank range; killed during routine traffic stops; choked to death while gasping for air. And we know what's captured on video represents only a fraction of the violence that Black Americans experience, some of it while in police custody. On Friday, Donald Trump referred to Black citizens in Minnesota protesting the killing of George Floyd at the hands of police as thugs and called for them to be shot, echoing the words of notorious racists of the past. Trump is quoting old racists for a simple and ugly reason. This president is a racist, too, and any leader who refuses to swiftly and unequivocally condemn this outrageous statement shares responsibility for its consequences. Trump threatens American lives and American democracy. We need to vote him and his enablers out. But people are hurting for reasons that go beyond Trump's statements. It's systemic racism and white supremacy that forces us to call for justice for George Floyd after he has been killed instead of providing it to him before the unthinkable happens. As a nation and a society we have some soul searching to do. Racial disparities persist in wealth, education, employment, housing, education, and health care -- and at a time when COVID-19 is disproportionately killing Black Americans and Black businesses are going under, it can feel as if this is the way things have been and always will be. But we are not without hope. The deep injustices we face are not inevitable. They were created and facilitated through racist, hateful, bigoted public policies. That means they can be addressed by different policies -- brave, inclusive, moral public policies. We have to make real change in our country. And it must start in our criminal justice system. In the case of George Floyd, all of those responsible must be held accountable -- and the Department of Justice must open a real investigation into unconstitutional policing patterns and practices in the Minneapolis Police Department. But beyond this case, we must fundamentally reform how the law is enforced in America. We need accountability for law enforcement and accountability at every stage of our criminal justice system. And any decent person who brings integrity and compassion to their work in the criminal justice system should welcome that kind of accountability. In fact, they should demand it. And we need to do much more to rethink our approach to public safety. That means transitioning away from a punitive system of locking people up and investing in community services that lift people up. The idea that communities of color alone are responsible for fighting against racism every single day is misguided and can have dangerous consequences. I also want to be thoughtful about the responsibility that I and others have as white Americans in this moment. We need to ask ourselves what we are doing proactively every day to dismantle systemic racism in our communities, our workplaces, and our circles of influence. It's not enough to stand as an ally. We must go further and be anti-racist. "" Elizabeth "" | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren Democrats All content (C) 2020 Warren Democrats, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

name: Laura Loomer
subject: She’s THANKED violent Rioters
body:
Our nation has been rocked by the needless murder of George Floyd.
| | | [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-378141-890450-5023865-54b0dc1ce7-7106c22629)
Patriot,

Our nation has been rocked by the needless murder of George Floyd.

What happened in Minneapolis was horrific and the solution requires an immediate change to policies, training and discipline within law enforcement agencies around the nation. That’s abundantly clear.

What’s also clear is that a violent reaction is NOT the solution.

More than ever, our leaders around the nation need to step up, so I was incredibly disappointed that MY OWN congresswoman and my opponent in this race THANKED protesters who have wreaked havoc in Florida’s 21st Congressional district.

Who was Frankel thanking?

Rioters who blocked traffic on I-95 . . .

Rioters who lit cars on fire . . .

Looters who deliberately ransacked stores and intentionally terrorized the community . . .
Here’s some of the aftermath:

**Lois Frankel, a sitting member of Congress, was thanking Antifa terrorists who are exploiting ANY situation to instigate violence and anarchy.** She congratulated the rioters the same day President Trump designated Antifa as a domestic terrorist organization.

We cannot have leaders within any level of government who openly encourage violence and selfish criminal actions.

**Help me retire Lois Frankel.[Support my campaign today.](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-378141-890450-5023864-1920ea13f4-7106c22629)** We can do better.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

---
| |
---
| **Have you had enough? I know I have!**

With the primary 60 days away, I need your help!

I am running for US Senate against career politicians in the Kansas Republican primary. And in the General Election, I will be taking on a Chuck Schumer and Nancy Pelosi clone Barbara Bollier. She is a turncoat Republican who switched parties to further her leftist agenda of open borders, aborting babies, as well as financial and voting rights support for illegals. **Bollier has always been against the America First agenda, and she will fight tooth and nail against everything President Trump tries to accomplish.**

_I pledge to support President Trump and his America First agenda. I strongly oppose abortion, gun control, open borders, and preference for illegals over our veterans. While Bollier will fight everything Trump tries to accomplish, I will put a stop to all the crazy things Schumer and Pelosi are trying to do to destroy our Constitution and our great country._

I have had enough of career politicians turning public service into a career they profit from.

That is not the intent of our forefathers and it has led to corruption on a scale that has brought our country to the brink. Career politicians are why I pledged my support for Term Limits.

Will you join me in supporting term limits for both the House and Senate? Together we will drain the swamp!

If you support term limits and draining the swamp, donate today!
---
| [Donate to Dave!](https://lindstromforsenate.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee3d772208da8fb4e06e0f598&id=fe6033844b&e=41f8e27552 "Donate to Dave!")
---
| **As a strong conservative businessman, I know how to balance budgets.**

_I have employed thousands of Kansans over the last 25 years of owning and running my business. Putting my family first has always been a top priority of mine, and that is why as a businessman keeping a balanced budget wasn’t just about profiting for myself – I had a duty to ensure the well-being of my employees and their families was met._

**As a former Kansas City Chief defensive end, I am not afraid to mix it up in a hostile environment.** We know that it is going to take fight the leftist Democrats and get our country back – and I am the candidate you can count on to tackle the issues and put the needs of hard working Americans First.

Will you join me TODAY in this fight to take our country back?

If you stand with me and are ready to drain the swamp, balance the budget, and put America First – DONATE today!

Dave Lindstrom

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Tomorrow: It's time to vote!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
Tomorrow is Primary Day in Indiana! Together as Republicans, we'll cast our ballots to pick our party's nominees for November -- and work to nominate | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us11.campaign-archive.com/?e=1acd9bb3d6&u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=4c0b856ecf)
---
| | [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7e0b6690d6&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---
| Indiana Republican,

Tomorrow is Primary Day in Indiana! Together as Republicans, we'll cast our ballots to pick our party's nominees for November \-- and work to nominate candidates who will continue to provide great government service to Hoosiers during these difficult times.

**Polls will be open from 6 a.m. - 6 p.m. local time. You can visit [IndianaVoters.com](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=2efb3a6acc&e=1acd9bb3d6) to look up which candidates will be on your ballot and find information on your polling location and contact information for your county election office.**

As we continue to fight the COVID-19 pandemic, Secretary of State Connie Lawson is urging Hoosiers who are voting in person to practice safe social distancing measures and use PPE. Your local poll workers have been equipped with PPE including gloves, face masks, hand sanitizer, and other sterilization tools.

If you have any problems, the toll-free Hoosier Voter Hotline at 866-IN-1-VOTE will be available for voters to speak directly to a representative for information, polling locations and to file grievances. On Primary Day, staff will be available to answer calls from 6 a.m. to 7 p.m. ET. Hoosiers can also visit [in.gov/sos](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d57645e684&e=1acd9bb3d6) for additional information, including information regarding Indiana’s photo ID law.
**For Hoosiers who still have their absentee ballot:**
* You'll need to hand deliver it to your county election board by noon local time tomorrow. If you're in Marion County, you can deliver it to an early voting location or a vote center, but it must be recieved by noon.

**For Hoosiers who have requested an absentee ballot but have not yet recieved it:**
* You can print and [fill out this form](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ace2223b94&e=1acd9bb3d6), and bring it with you to the polls to vote in person.

Secretary of State Connie Lawson is dedicated to holding a safe & secure election that will ensure Hoosiers throughout the state will be heard. Thank you all in advance for doing your part to keep strong Republican leadership in place in our state and our nation!

-Indiana Republican Party

---
|
---
---
---

name: Chris Jacobs
subject: Endorsed by the National Rifle Association
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JACOBS FOR CONGRESS [Unsubscribe](http://sendy
body:
|
---
Friend, Today I was endorsed by the National Rifle Association. I have supported and defended the Second Amendment my entire public career, and it is a responsibility I have taken extremely seriously in office. Whether it was fighting for the privacy of pistol permit holders or battling Governor Cuomo over the unconstitutional SAFE Act - I have always stood with law abiding gun owners. It was this commitment to our rights that has made me the only candidate in NY27 to have the endorsement of the NRA.
Right now radical democrats, like Nancy Pelosi and my opponent Nate McMurray, are dead set on eroding our constitutional rights - that is why this election on June 23rd is absolutely critical. We have to protect our right to defend ourselves and our families, and I promise to be the fiercest ally for the Second Amendment in Congress. The radical liberals won't get away with taking our rights away on my watch, and together I will work with President Trump to ensure the Second Amendment remains strong, protected, and respected - you have my word. I hope you and your family are staying safe during this time. Stay Strong! Sincerely,
Chris Jacobs

subject: Sneak Peek: First look at our new TV ad!
body:
We're in the home stretch now | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/572d8f57e526/calling-all-patriots-12457350?e=795c6d9796)
---
| | [ ](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=72eb381543&e=795c6d9796)
---
| [ ](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=380e09036b&e=795c6d9796)
---
| | [SNEAK PEAK: Our first TV ad!](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=7a3fa8688a&e=795c6d9796 "SNEAK PEAK: Our first TV ad!")
---
| Peter,

**We're on the air!**

I just wanted to give our supporters a [sneak peak look at our first TV ad](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=5d966a8ad6&e=795c6d9796), "America First," airing all over Oklahoma's 5th District starting tomorrow morning.

For months, we have canvassed this district, taking our message straight to the voters on why I'm the best candidate to beat liberal Kendra Horn and be be your conservative voice in Washington.

It's now June and the primary is just 29 days away. So it's crunch time.

**To make sure that this ad stays on the air for the next 29 days, we're going to need your support.**

Prices vary for TV ads, depending on various factors including the station and time, but you can help us run this new ad one time for as low as $35, then $65, $90, $180 and up to $225 and beyond. This is critical in getting our message out to the district.

[**Would you make a donation now so we can continue to bring our AMERICA FIRST message to voters for the remainder of the primary?**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=03032a5990&e=795c6d9796)
---
| [Help Air Our Ad! Donate $35 >>](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=af4db306a6&e=795c6d9796 "Help Air Our Ad! Donate $35 >>")
---
| [Help Air Our Ad! Donate $65 >>](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=4d63742120&e=795c6d9796 "Help Air Our Ad! Donate $65 >>")
---
| [Help Air Our Ad! Donate $90 >>](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=b8a1316aec&e=795c6d9796 "Help Air Our Ad! Donate $90 >>")
---
| [Help Air Our Ad! Donate $180 >>](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=71a5be2f99&e=795c6d9796 "Help Air Our Ad! Donate $180 >>")
---
| [Help Air Our Ad! Donate $225 >>](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=a6ae3457ab&e=795c6d9796 "Help Air Our Ad! Donate $225 >>")
---
| I am battle-tested and a proven conservative fighter. We need that in Congress now more than ever -- to defend our Oklahoma values.

It will take all of us to defeat liberal Kendra Horn and the threat she poses for our state and country.

**[Chip in today to help us keep our ad on the airwaves and let's send a conservative fighter to help President Trump in Congress](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=35f41ae639&e=795c6d9796).**

I'm looking forward to seeing you out on the campaign trail!

Best,
[](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=d8f30b8823&e=795c6d9796) \--Janet Barresi
---
| [Help us keep our ad on the air! Donate Now >>](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=d1d7f729e4&e=795c6d9796 "Help us keep our ad on the air! Donate Now >>")
---

Janet for CongressPO Box 20147Oklahoma City, OK 73156-0147

Want to change how you receive these emails?
