name: Holcomb Crew
subject: Devoting every breath
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
it’s critical that the violence we saw this weekend never happens again | | |
---|---|---
Friends,

_**“Every breath that we take...that we have left should be devoted to making sure what happened to Mr. Floyd never happens again.” -Gov. Holcomb**_

This weekend, Indiana and the nation saw a time of turmoil. Following the heinous death of Mr. George Floyd in Minnesota, Hoosiers took to Indiana streets to make their voice heard, rightfully protesting to shine a light on injustice and inequity.

We stand with those who peacefully exercised their first amendment right, while we condemn unnecessary and tragic violence and destruction.

Mr. Floyd’s last words – “I can’t breathe” – should forever remind us that what happened to him must never happen again, and that we must hold those responsible to the fullest extent of the law. It’s a calling worthy of every breath we take.

But it’s also critical that the violence we saw this weekend never happens again.
[ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=0834639a62f944ec9ca31d8ac6730b4a&_e=UX1b_z2JMkDGy7U1NdcIbyKR_qrVz7bbj7zpf_fWSq1C3XRjBpuUT_zD8w6bhWnquJxnBbiecZpglvwAHJRIXozOCNo1ScbYyw-p87Q7zbb3OE_eTyAJii3o51jg9TQxfW2rWS2YxkNw4VEe18pdCjzxwgdEvFFhO1OHH8DTrqpvvCPXcDAbW3twHDM4_ragdA7LoGwIK5LMyIR-J3OBTll4rWEkzj8Au6TAxGSUCLyvIzWcpv-XX9kLhuNlWxkzrMjNm0-7r_OtruQDo8jWgECyQkjH52Y2DB3uAwXv-814yPe6glqg2bV1yzwq0cKhjB3WQIfsi4hto7NeRTCrFe9DBBWScEAfyFJEEZ_VsKIUxFrq7uMyp5Vre3wEApu512a1_wFd8_MEDREmMYh4VpKditFYH7kpzAyIcPCE570%3D)
[**Watch: “We must harness—not squander—the energy generated in the aftermath of the Floyd injustice.”**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=0834639a62f944ec9ca31d8ac6730b4a&_e=UX1b_z2JMkDGy7U1NdcIbyKR_qrVz7bbj7zpf_fWSq1C3XRjBpuUT_zD8w6bhWnquJxnBbiecZpglvwAHJRIXozOCNo1ScbYyw-p87Q7zbb3OE_eTyAJii3o51jg9TQxfW2rWS2YxkNw4VEe18pdCjzxwgdEvFFhO1OHH8DTrqpvvCPXcDAbW3twHDM4_ragR_ia4fZA2O4A4rseSLSBYpuCHq7SQOM-YaxE2QfbOwnSI0iGeHsx7crps1sLCvBr0Dn5L0CD0PuYRREIs68ncAtRSzQyN9s_j1uAFTLgBQ0iGA1yikGprQu3CdJZ14B60qeAgubw0krgz0Rkjg_YU8afzCexvIL80wZv8pnuCy6e8QZMpvYhSZMqzlPvj5z45JBGttYq0IBszddWt1yIzRUU2u0qYVJu18Y4zyyxomU%3D)
That’s why the Indiana State Police and Indiana National Guard will continue to assist local communities with the resources they request to help them enforce the rule of law and protect the safety of all Hoosiers.

As Governor Holcomb said, _**“Violence in the streets makes progress harder...it sets us back from forming that more perfect union.”**_

No citizen has the right to threaten another Hoosiers’ safety.

In Indiana, we’ve made progress on supporting Hoosiers from diverse backgrounds, including passing Indiana’s first ever hate crimes law protecting 6.7 million Hoosiers, launching free training for in-demand jobs, and providing resources to address infant mortality in Indiana’s hardest hit areas.

But we’re not done yet. We must create a to-do list, with action steps including:
* Better healthcare access
* Affordable housing
* Educational opportunity
* Job training and placement
* Urban economic development
* Criminal justice reform

_**We cannot let the voice of the peacemakers be cast aside.[Will you take the time to watch Gov. Holcomb’s five-minute remarks, and share them widely?](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=0834639a62f944ec9ca31d8ac6730b4a&_e=UX1b_z2JMkDGy7U1NdcIbyKR_qrVz7bbj7zpf_fWSq1C3XRjBpuUT_zD8w6bhWnquJxnBbiecZpglvwAHJRIXozOCNo1ScbYyw-p87Q7zbb3OE_eTyAJii3o51jg9TQxfW2rWS2YxkNw4VEe18pdCjzxwgdEvFFhO1OHH8DTrqpvvCPXcDAbW3twHDM4_ragnn9B7_AzIQCrqo7o_AAuqC6h9jWKxEO-9m1gLio-nuJZXnFdyfwZ1O41RwEFajAgp0SfwSpkVBIJz-iuKAkpKb94T9t7NlYe_E2ThJDgrB2bf_8p-5fhZSJbFGbedl1OZc_Y1u2a33S0bqi_6Wi1pTNTuMe-zwTpo6X9Z6sws_jcjaYkPVoJ_rKsE6MKwX748xtD1VoLkZpqUko6jPOUKrIqaeIwatl3sfITCN3UzqI%3D)
**_

Together, we will make progress – we don’t have more time or lives to lose.

_**“Use your breath and your will in efforts to bridge, not divide.”-Gov. Holcomb**_

-Your Holcomb Crew

name: Georgette =?iso-8859-1?b?R/NtZXo=?=
subject: We ended carotid restraint in San Diego. Now, let’s end it nationally.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgette Gomez for Congress
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17716601/203897659/1001356148?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjViMzgyYS04MmE0LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XRAKW6LwFxyR0kfvVvTlP_MH9dWswJDWUon9MgldkY0=&emci=3e5b382a-82a4-ea11-9b05-00155d0394bb&emdi=3f5b382a-82a4-ea11-9b05-00155d0394bb&ceid=8780864)
Friend --

Earlier today we saw a President continue to incite, demonize and divide. In San Diego, we’re going in the other direction – united, focused on fighting for justice and determined to keep the peace.

I’m proud to announce that San Diego is one of the first cities in America to take direct action to ensure that the tactics that led to George Floyd’s tragic death are never used here.

**Today, the San Diego Police Department is ending use of the carotid restraint – a chokehold technique many of us have worked for years to ban.**

This is an important step forward for police reform, building trust between communities and law enforcement and it’s long past time.

We’re putting the passions of the protests towards real progress for racial justice, fair policing and upholding the dignity of every San Diegan.

**[We need to take the next step. Please sign my petition calling on Congress to implement a nationwide ban on carotid restraint.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17716602/203897660/-609082886?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjViMzgyYS04MmE0LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XRAKW6LwFxyR0kfvVvTlP_MH9dWswJDWUon9MgldkY0=&emci=3e5b382a-82a4-ea11-9b05-00155d0394bb&emdi=3f5b382a-82a4-ea11-9b05-00155d0394bb&ceid=8780864)**

Chokeholds incite at a time when we need to de-escalate. A knee on the neck ended the life out of George Floyd. And in San Diego, we are determined to ensure that never happens here.

To the peaceful protesters: I know you’re angry – and I’m angry too. I want you to know that we hear your voices and we are taking action. And there’s more reform to come.

And to the San Diego Police: We need you to de escalate, not escalate, in these highly charged moments. And I want to thank our Chief of Police David Nisleit for helping implement this important reform.

San Diego – please stay safe tonight. Please stay united tonight. And please know that our work for justice, dignity and respect for all continues.

From the bottom of my heart,

_Georgette Gómez_

**Georgette Gómez helped implement a ban on the use of carotid restraint by Police in San Diego, but we need to take the next step. Sign our petition calling on Congress to pass a nationwide ban on carotid restraint NOW.**
[Sign The Petition](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17716603/203897661/-609082886?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjViMzgyYS04MmE0LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XRAKW6LwFxyR0kfvVvTlP_MH9dWswJDWUon9MgldkY0=&emci=3e5b382a-82a4-ea11-9b05-00155d0394bb&emdi=3f5b382a-82a4-ea11-9b05-00155d0394bb&ceid=8780864)
